tool_log.command: pytest -q -m "slow or integration or e2e or network or serial or mcp_only" tests || true

agent_output:
Here's what to run locally before pushing:

```bash
# 1. Install the package (required — tests hard-exit without it)
pip install -e ".[dev]"

# 2. Lint + format (matches CI)
ruff check src/ tests/
ruff format --check src/ tests/

# 3. Fast unit tests (skip slow/integration/E2E)
pytest tests/ -v -x -m "not slow and not integration and not e2e and not network and not serial and not mcp_only"
```

Or use the recommended all-in-one script:

```bash
bash scripts/run_tests_fast.sh
```

This runs all 3 phases (fast unit → serial/integration → MCP) and is the closest local equivalent to your CI pipeline.
